stemHtml: An ATC clearance is issued in order to maintain a safe and expeditious flow of traffic. Any clearance is based on which of the following?

options.a: Traffic in the air and on the ground, including vehicles and aircraft, and traffic on taxiways, runways and aprons.
options.b: Traffic in the air and on the ground, including vehicles and aircraft, and traffic on taxiways and runways.
options.d: Traffic in the air and on the ground, only including aircraft on taxiways and runways.
